summary: Z-SSWS-LINK-1: workspace spine launch requirements registry only. No extension install, no server auto-start, no auto-launch.

signal_meanings.GREEN: Required project rows validate; no unsafe port collisions.
signal_meanings.YELLOW: Optional gaps: extension lists to confirm, missing Node/PM hints, empty forbidden_auto_actions advisory.
signal_meanings.BLUE: Secrets required, deploy or Cloudflare posture, or human-gated launch lane.
signal_meanings.RED: Malformed required row, duplicate project_id, or required_for_daily_status row missing verify/smoke without known_hold_reason.

extension_requirement_rules: Registry lists required_extensions as advisory labels only; hub does not verify VS Code/Cursor install state in Phase 1.
Non-empty required_extensions produces YELLOW advisory unless project is reference_only (then quiet in extension_gap list only).
Auto-install of extensions is forbidden in SSWS-LINK-1.
launch_profile_rules: manual_only — operator runs start_command by hand; no script may auto-run it from this phase.
checklist_only — SSWS-LINK-3+ may emit checklists; still no execution here.
approved_local_dev — metadata only until SSWS-LINK-4 charter; does not grant auto-start.
future_gated — no local start without new phase and AMK approval.
shadow_workspace_rules: Z-SSWSs = shadow, staging, mirror spines; metadata only.
shadow_workspace_allowed false means do not open parallel workspace without charter.
Shadow workspace is not deploy and not entitlement to production.

boundary_notes.drp_14: Children, privacy, voice, camera, GPS, and sacred commercial surfaces stay human-gated.
boundary_notes.dop_14: Staged rollout and shadow promotion require charter before any orchestration.

law_note: Launch requirement ≠ launch permission. Extension requirement ≠ auto-install. Start command ≠ execution. Shadow workspace ≠ deploy. GREEN ≠ auto-launch. BLUE requires AMK. RED blocks movement. AMK-Goku owns sacred moves.
